zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Washbourne於1452年出生在英國武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆時，她的父親Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11449歲，母親Elizabeth Knivton33歲。她於大約1474年與Nicholas Foliot在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維其福德享年87歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Washbourne于1452年出生在英国武斯特斯爾斯坦福 奧 姆时，她的父亲Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11449岁，母亲Elizabeth Knivton33岁。她于大约1474年与Nicholas Foliot在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1539年在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維其福德享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: Washbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucs) or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The variant Washburn could also be from Washburn (WR Yorks), but there is comparatively little evidence that this place yielded a surname.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Washbourne was born in 1452, in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, her father, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, was 11449 and her mother, Elizabeth Knivton, was 33. She married Nicholas Foliot about 1474, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1539, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Washbourne est née en 1452, à Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, avait 11449 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Knivton, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Foliot environ 1474, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1539, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Washbourne 1452 in Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire 11449 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Knivton 33. Sie hat um 1474 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England Nicholas Foliot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1539 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Washbourne è nata il nel 1452 nel Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, aveva 11449 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Knivton, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Foliot circa 1474, nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1539, nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Washbourneが1452年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスタンフォード オン テメで生まれた時，父Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershireは11449歳，母Elizabeth Knivtonは33歳であった。約1474年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードでNicholas Foliotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Washbourne(이)가 1452년 영국 워스스터실르 스탠퍼드  테에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire(은)는 11449세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Knivton(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1474년 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 Nicholas Foliot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Washbourne nasceu em 1452, em Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tinha 11449 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Knivton, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Foliot aproximadamente 1474, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1539, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Washbourne родилась в 1452 г. в местности станфорд он тем, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire было 11449 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Knivton, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Foliot около 1474 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1539 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Washbourne nació en 1452, en Stanford on Teme, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tenía 11449 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Knivton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Nicholas Foliot aproximadamente 1474, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1539, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 87 años.
